title: (Bearish Signal) APPS, Stochastic Oscillator left the overbought zone on March 04, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that APPS's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to sell the stock or take a defensive position. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 65 similar cases where APPS's stochastic oscillator exited the overbought zone, and 52 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 80%. Current price $68.81 is above $55.64 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/01/21 - 03/04/21, the price experienced a +32% Uptrend. During the week of 02/25/21 - 03/04/21, the stock enjoyed a +9% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/uyjgvbb5q8l61.png?width=1526&format=png&auto=webp&s=966325dc9026faf2af5f38c112318ea4345b138d

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for APPS moved out of overbought territory on February 12, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 49 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 35 of the 49 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 71%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on March 04, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on APPS as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 69 of 94 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 73%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for APPS turned negative on March 04, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 54 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 39 of the 54 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 72%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where APPS declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 78%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9688061-digital-turbine-s-apps-78-82-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-march-04-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
